description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, featuring blue accents on the tail, engines, and branding. The aircraft has two large underwing turbofan engines, swept-back low-mounted wings with slight upward winglets, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The windows are arranged in a single row along the fuselage, indicating a typical single-aisle configuration. The tail fin is blue with white stars, and the word 'HiFly' is prominently displayed on the fuselage. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable and housed within the body during flight. The overall design is consistent with a commercial jetliner used for urban-to-urban air travel.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet with blue accents, underwing engines, and a conventional tail, branded 'HiFly'. The airplane features swept low-mounted wings and a streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, twin underwing engines, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the 'HiFly' branding, row of windows, blue tail fin with stars, and the swept wing design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, both engines, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with similar features to view 1, showing the blue tail and engine details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with slight upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle (not visible, inferred from typical design and absence in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and multiple windows.
